title: People icons
excerpt:
Hi, 
Is there a way I can get the people icon via GraphQL API? 
 
Br, YH

posts.author: yarhuoy (Ng Yar Huoy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Is there a way I can get the people icon via GraphQL API?

Br, YH

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
{
  users(ids: 123456) {
    name
    photo_thumb
  }
}

Gives you the URL to the thumbnail photo of user with id 123456

posts.author: yarhuoy (Ng Yar Huoy)
posts.cookedHtml: This is exactly what I’m looking for! Thanks!!
